test for one pair

Source: R/poker.R
one_pair.Rd

test for one pair

Usage

one_pair(x)

Arguments

x

a vector of cards

Value

logical(1)

Examples

d = build_deck()
hand_1 = c(d[1], d[14], d[2:4] )
hand_1
#> [1] "2 ♡" "2 ♢" "3 ♡" "4 ♡" "5 ♡"
one_pair(hand_1)
#> [1] TRUE
hand_2 = c(d[1], d[6], d[2:4] )
hand_2
#> [1] "2 ♡" "7 ♡" "3 ♡" "4 ♡" "5 ♡"
one_pair(hand_2)
#> [1] FALSE

On this page
